centre_info.name: IELTS Beta Centre
centre_info.opening_hours: Monday–Saturday: 8:00 AM – 10:00 PM; Sunday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
centre_info.about: IELTS Beta is a premium IELTS preparation centre in Sylhet committed to helping students achieve their target band score. Our team includes certified IDP and British Council IELTS examiners and Cambridge-trained coaches.

venues.name: The Audio Lab
venues.description: Professional Listening studio with authentic exam audio and noise-cancelling booths. 2026 Update: Includes simulated 'Video Call Speaking' audio landscapes.

venues.name: The Draftroom
venues.description: Writing workshop space with sample essay banks (Band 6–9) and individual feedback desks.

venues.name: The Studio
venues.description: Multimedia Speaking studio with AI-powered simulators and video playback for self-review.

global_2026_updates.one_skill_retake: Available for Computer-Delivered tests. Allows retaking one module within 60 days of the original test.
global_2026_updates.computer_delivered_standard: As of 2026, Computer-Delivered IELTS is the primary format. Results are typically released in 2-5 days.
global_2026_updates.video_call_speaking: Speaking tests may be conducted via high-definition video link with a live examiner at the Sylhet centre.
global_2026_updates.eor_policy: Enquiry on Results (Remarking) fee is refunded if the score increases.

test_day_rules.check_in: Arrive 45 minutes before test time. Doors close strictly.
